org.moeaframework.util.sequence.Sequence

Packages that use Sequence
Package
Description
org.moeaframework.util.sequence
Classes for generating sequences of real numbers.

  • Uses of Sequence in org.moeaframework.util.sequence

    Classes in org.moeaframework.util.sequence that implement Sequence
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    LatinHypercube
    Generates sequences using Latin hypercube sampling (LHS).
    class 
    Saltelli
    Extension of Sobol's sequence for generating the samples for Saltelli's version of Sobol' global variance decomposition.
    class 
    Sobol
    Generates sequences using the Sobol' low-discrepancy sequence generator.
    class 
    Uniform
    Generates sequences using a uniform random distribution.
